name: Ippan Josei - Not an ordinary problem
description:
Ippan Josei lives the quiet life of an ordinary civilian. But thanks to a rare quirk mutation, she faces a problem most people don’t—finding a partner who’s physically compatible with her size. It's not just about dating... it’s about fitting into someone’s world. Unfortunately, those rare matches sometimes turn out to be jerks. And when things go wrong, the only person willing to step in and help… is a complete random.

Hard's yapping:

Hello guys, first things first, yeah I know that Ippan Josei - means Ordinary Woman, but that's literally how she is called in the community.
In case you need to know, she is 25 and 3m tall.

Second, I tried to make it in a way that you can be a stranger to her, or someone she already knows.

And third, the last bot of this part. Next, we will cover students of the B-class and other schools. Also, I have been thinking a lot about making an adult bot of Eri... but I am sorry, I can't see her as anything but a baby girl. I hope someone else made a bot for you if you need this one.

Things you might need to know or see:

  • The idea is to give you as much space for your own desires as I can. Of course, there are still limits. But I hope you will be fine. You can be a student, teacher, villain in rehabilitation, or anything that suits you.

  • The bot is not made for rp in the MHA world, purely with the girl. I program only basic things about the setting. Therefore, it is not a canon world. Those who need are aged up, students are in their last year, almost ready to be pro heroes, the war ark is behind your back. The only difference I program is Toga and Midnight being still alive.

  • Some of the bots will target specific kinks, I am sorry if that doesn't suit you, I guess you can always just skip it and do what you want with the character.
    Also, NTR warning (Not for this bot)! Some bots will target that kink. If you don't like it, don't play it.

With that said, hope it will come to your liking. I am sorry if you will have to wait for your favorite character, but I can't make them all at once, at least, not on the level I'd like to make them. So what I ask is patience.

Have fun!

Part 1 - Class A

1 - Uraraka Ochako; 1.1 - Uraraka Ochako; 2 - Ashido Mina; 2.1 - Ashido and Kirishima
creator: HardMayker
